question: Is the image layout arranged as a dashboard containing a top KPI section, a left multi-line chart, an upper-right stacked bar chart, a lower-right pie chart, and a bottom table?
Is the visual style 'vector flat' with colorful elements and no 3D effects or heavy shadows?
Does the top KPI section contain exactly three cards, including one displaying 'Total trips = 111.4M'?
Do the other KPI cards display 'Peak month = Aug (10.45M)' and 'Mode share in Aug = Bus 3.9 / Metro 5.3 / Bike 1.25'?
Does the left multi-line chart have a title 'Monthly Trips (M)', an x-axis labeled Jan–Dec, and a y-axis range of 0–6?
Does the multi-line chart contain exactly three lines with point markers, colored Green (Bus), Blue (Metro), and Orange (Bike)?
In the multi-line chart, is the Blue (Metro) line consistently the highest and the Orange (Bike) line consistently the lowest?
Are the annotations 'Heatwave' (at July) and 'Storm' (at September) present on the multi-line chart?
Does the upper-right stacked bar chart have a title 'Fare Revenue by Payment Type (USD M)', x-axis Q1–Q4, and y-axis 0–170?
Do the stacked bars display the correct total values at the top: Q1=120, Q2=135, Q3=150, Q4=140?
Does each bar in the stacked chart consist of exactly four segments representing Contactless, Card, Cash, and Pass?
Does the lower-right pie chart contain exactly 5 slices with percentages 52%, 18%, 12%, 10%, and 8% labeled outside the slices?
Does the pie chart include a legend identifying Commuter, Student, Senior, Tourist, and Other?
Does the bottom table consist of exactly 4 columns and 4 rows (Header row + Bus, Metro, Bike rows)?
In the table, are the '2025 Total' values exactly 42.1 (Bus), 58.5 (Metro), and 10.8 (Bike)?
Does the table correctly display the calculated 'Avg per month' (Bus~3.5, Metro~4.9, Bike~0.9) and 'Peak month' (Bus: Aug, Metro: Aug, Bike: Jul)?
Are all text labels, numerals, and legends in the dashboard clearly readable without blurring, garbling, or overlap?
